'''Tantive V''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tantive system/Legends|Tantive system]] of [[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]]. It was the location of the [[Battle of Tantive V]], after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] won the battle, causing the retreat of [[Gaen Drommel]] to [[Soullex]].
